name: Supply Chain Fraud Detection
description: Batch Apache Beam pipeline that ingests WMS + ERP JSONL events from GCS and writes bronze/silver/gold tables to BigQuery, with velocity + anomaly fraud detection.

parameters.name: wms_input
parameters.label: WMS input JSONL path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the WMS receiving events file. Example: gs://my-bucket/wms_receiving.jsonl

parameters.name: erp_input
parameters.label: ERP input JSONL path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the ERP invoices file. Example: gs://my-bucket/erp_invoices.jsonl

parameters.name: bq_dataset
parameters.label: BigQuery dataset (project:dataset)
parameters.helpText: Fully qualified target dataset. Example: fraud-detect-260526-1750:fraud_detection

parameters.name: dedup_ttl_seconds
parameters.label: Dedup TTL (seconds)
parameters.helpText: How long the stateful dedup DoFn remembers seen invoice_ids. Default 3600.

parameters.name: velocity_window_seconds
parameters.label: Velocity window (seconds)
parameters.helpText: Sliding window size for the velocity rule. Default 600 (10 min).

parameters.name: anomaly_stddev_threshold
parameters.label: Anomaly z-score threshold
parameters.helpText: Standard deviations above the vendor baseline to fire ANOMALY alert. Default 3.0.
